summary: The planning session identified significant workflow inefficiencies in the digital literacy program, specifically the manual, time-consuming process of drafting personalized post-workshop follow-up emails. The team also noted challenges with the current searchability of their internal FAQ knowledge base.
discussion_points: High manual effort required for drafting individual follow-up emails (2-3 hours per workshop cycle).
Feasibility of using AI-assisted template drafting to reduce communication time.
The necessity of human review for follow-up messages due to sensitive community context and specific resource referencing.
Difficulty in searching and retrieving information from the existing FAQ document.
decisions: Explore the use of AI-assisted template drafting for follow-up communications.
Maintain a mandatory human review step for all AI-generated follow-up content to ensure contextual accuracy and sensitivity.
action_items: Investigate and pilot AI tools capable of drafting personalized follow-up email templates.
Review and restructure the existing FAQ document to improve search functionality and information architecture.
risks: AI-generated content may lack necessary contextual nuance, leading to inappropriate or insensitive communication if human review is bypassed.
Implementation of new AI tools may require significant initial training and integration time.

lessons.description: Repetitive, high-volume communication tasks are prime candidates for automation.
Contextual knowledge and sensitivity require human oversight, even when using advanced automation tools.

insights.description: The current workflow suffers from a bottleneck in post-workshop communication, consuming valuable staff time.
The knowledge base (FAQ) is functional but poorly optimized for retrieval, hindering staff efficiency.

follow_up_recommendation: Prioritize a Proof-of-Concept (PoC) for AI-assisted email drafting, focusing on a small batch of workshops, while simultaneously initiating a project to migrate the FAQ into a searchable knowledge base platform.
